$schema-comment: Sub-project status seed. Updated on milestone-close PRs per spec §2.13. Statuses: not-started | in-progress | complete. Counts are taken from the implementation plans committed under docs/superpowers/plans/.

subProjects.name: Project Infrastructure
subProjects.summary: Repo migration, GitHub config, branch protection, CI stub, hook chain, Netlify wiring (2 projects), 2 Supabase projects, GitHub Pages dashboard, methodology playbook.

subProjects.name: Foundation
subProjects.summary: RR v7 scaffold, Drizzle schema (15 tables) + initial migration, 32 RLS policies + JWT custom-access-token hook, dev seed, login flow with role-aware admin/employer shells, admin CLI, intern identity lookup, full test pyramid (10 unit + 9 RLS + 8 e2e), real CI pipeline (supabase start for integration), Netlify build config.

subProjects.name: Admin Core
subProjects.summary: Admin shell, Settings (Employers / Cohorts / Roles / Phases / Barriers / Program Info), Interns CRUD.

subProjects.name: Question Engine
subProjects.summary: 6 question-type renderers, set editor, 3-tier competency stitching, verbatim seed content.

subProjects.name: Assessment Forms
subProjects.summary: All 5 assessment forms on the engine, intern identity gate, anonymous submission via service role.

subProjects.name: Employer Shell
subProjects.summary: Employer login, scoped views, account provisioning, branded auth pages.

subProjects.name: Polish & Launch
subProjects.summary: Reports, branded emails, Sentry, e2e smoke, a11y, perf, launch. (Netlify cutover task is now obsolete — each repo has its own Netlify project.)
